### Overview

## What Is NVIDIA Nemotron?

NVIDIA Nemotron™ is a family of open models, datasets, and technologies that empower you to build efficient, accurate, and specialized agentic AI systems. Designed for advanced reasoning, coding, visual understanding, agentic tasks, safety, speech, and information retrieval, Nemotron models are openly available and integrated across the AI ecosystem so they can be deployed anywhere—from edge to cloud.

With transparent training data and broad platform support, including NVIDIA RTX PRO and NVIDIA DGX Spark™, Nemotron makes it easier to create and deploy trustworthy, high-performance AI agents.

### Building the Future Together: Meet the Nemotron Coalition

Mistral AI, Black Forest Labs, Thinking Machines Lab, Reflection AI, Cursor, LangChain, Sarvam and Perplexity join forces to build the next open frontier models.

[Read Press Release](https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/news/nvidia-launches-nemotron-coalition-of-leading-global-ai-labs-to-advance-open-frontier-models)

### NVIDIA Expands Open Models for Agentic and Physical AI

New open models power AI agents, physical AI for robotics, and healthcare research.

[Read Press Release](https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/news/nvidia-expands-open-model-families-to-power-the-next-wave-of-agentic-physical-and-healthcare-ai)

### Benefits

## What Does Nemotron Bring to Agentic AI?

![Icon for Open Models](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Open Models

NVIDIA’s open data and optimization techniques ensure powerful, transparent, and adaptable models for developers and enterprises. Models and training data are published openly on Hugging Face.

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### High Compute Efficiency

Through the pruning of larger models, the Nemotron family is optimized for top compute efficiency, using NVIDIA TensorRT™-LLM to deliver higher throughput and on-or-off reasoning capabilities.

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### High Accuracy

Built on popular open reasoning models for their exceptional knowledge, post-trained with high-quality training data, and aligned to reason like humans, Nemotron models achieve the highest accuracy on leading benchmarks.

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Secure and Simple Deployment

The Nemotron model family, available as optimized NVIDIA NIM™ microservices, offers peak inference performance and flexible deployment options, ensuring superior security, privacy, and portability.

### Models

## Models for Diverse Workloads

Nemotron models excel in a range of agentic AI tasks, including reasoning, [vision](https://build.nvidia.com/search?filters=publisher%3Anvidia&q=%22vision%22+and+%22nemotron%22), [retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)](https://developer.nvidia.com/nemo-retriever?sortBy=developer_learning_library%2Fsort%2Ffeatured_in.nemo_retriever%3Adesc%2Ctitle%3Aasc), [speech](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/ai-data-science/products/riva/), and [safety](https://developer.nvidia.com/nemo-guardrails). [Research models](https://research.nvidia.com/labs/adlr/projects/) are also available for experimentation.

### Reasoning

Nemotron models support a range of reasoning workloads. **Nano** provides superior accuracy and efficiency for highly targeted tasks, **Super** offers the highest accuracy and throughput to run complex tasks on multi-agent systems, and **Ultra** delivers the best reasoning for mission-critical applications that demand maximum capability over multi-step workflows.

### Visual Understanding

Nemotron models deliver leading accuracy in multi-image reasoning and video understanding, with strong document intelligence, visual Q&A, and summarization capabilities.

Use NVIDIA Nemotron Parse to extract document data, then NVIDIA Nemotron 2 Nano VL to correlate textual content with charts, diagrams, and other visuals for intelligent querying

### Speech

NVIDIA Nemotron Speech models provide high-throughput, ultra-low latency automatic speech recognition (ASR), text-to-speech (TTS), and neural machine translation (NMT) for agentic AI applications.

### Retrieval-Augmented Generation

Nemotron RAG models deliver fast, accurate document understanding by extracting multimodal structured information, generating high-quality embeddings, and rank-ordering the most relevant documents. They provide scalable, high-speed retrieval that enhances data quality for LLM training, boosts agent and retriever performance, and streamlines document workflows.

### Safety

NVIDIA Nemotron Safety models provide real-time protection against harmful content, off-topic drift, and jailbreak attempts. They add a multilingual, multimodal, content safety layer with reasoning capabilities, enhancing moderation and ensuring cultural alignment.

[View All Nemotron Models](https://build.nvidia.com/search/models?q=Nemotron)

### Technology

## Building Blocks for Agentic AI

Start building and optimizing AI agents with NVIDIA NeMo™ for custom agentic AI, NVIDIA NIM for fast, enterprise-ready deployment, and NVIDIA Blueprints for accelerating development with customizable reference workflows.

![NVIDIA NeMo](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### NVIDIA NeMo

- Build, customize, and deploy generative AI and agentic AI.
- Deliver enterprise-ready large language models (LLMs) with precise data curation, cutting-edge customization, scalable data ingestion, RAG, and accelerated performance.
- Easily build data flywheels and continuously optimize AI agents with the latest information.

[Get Started With NeMo](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/ai-data-science/products/nemo/)

![Deploy Generative AI With NVIDIA NIM](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### NVIDIA NIM

- Speed up deployment of performance-optimized generative AI models.
- Run your business applications with stable and secure APIs, backed by enterprise-grade support.

[Get Started With NIM](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/ai-data-science/products/nim-microservices/)

![NVIDIA NIM Workflow Blueprints](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### NVIDIA Blueprints

- Quickly get started with reference applications for generative AI use cases, such as enterprise deep research and multimodal RAG.
- Accelerate development with blueprints, which include partner microservices, one or more AI agents, reference code, customization documentation, and a Helm chart for deployment.

[Get Started With Blueprints](https://build.nvidia.com/blueprints)

## FAQs

### Are NVIDIA Nemotron models open or open source?

NVIDIA Nemotron models aren't just open, but truly open source. NVIDIA publishes the training datasets, techniques, and model weights so the open-source community can benefit from our learnings and use these resources to create their own models.

### What does the NVIDIA Open Models License provide to developers?

The NVIDIA Open Model License is a permissive license that allows users to use, modify, distribute, and commercially deploy the models and derivatives without crediting NVIDIA, to encourage innovation and further development of generative AI.

### Can I run NVIDIA Nemotron models for free in production?

Yes, you can download and run NVIDIA Nemotron models from [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/collections/nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-v3) for free in production.

### Can I run NVIDIA Nemotron models as NVIDIA NIM?

NVIDIA also offers Nemotron models as NVIDIA NIM microservices for secure, scalable deployment, which requires an NVIDIA AI Enterprise license. You can try the Nemotron models and download the NIM microservices from [build.nvidia.com](https://build.nvidia.com/search?q=Nemotron).

### Is NVIDIA committed to publishing more Nemotron models in the future?

Yes, NVIDIA is committed to publishing more Nemotron models, datasets, and techniques to enable open-source ecosystems.

### How do the NVIDIA Nemotron models compare to other open models?

NVIDIA Nemotron models are built on top of frontier open models, making it possible to build better models faster. Additionally, NVIDIA publishes the model weights, training datasets, and training techniques so the developer community can use these different parts of Nemotron to train their own models.

### Are the Llama Nemotron models also part of the NVIDIA Nemotron family?

Yes. NVIDIA built the Llama Nemotron models on top of the Llama model family using NVIDIA’s open datasets and advanced techniques, such as Neural Architecture Search (NAS). The Llama Nemotron models inherit the parent Llama model license.

### How do I optimize the models to run at scale in production?

NVIDIA provides a variety of tools, such as NVIDIA Dynamo, TensorRT-LLM, and NIM, to run Nemotron models at scale in production. You can also use popular open-source libraries, such as SGLang and vLLM.

# Advancing Multimodal Systems: Alignment, Information Typology, Reasoning, and Cross-Modal Flow

Andrea Pilzer, HER Solutions Architect, NVIDIA

Karin Sevegnani, Solutions Architect, NVIDIA

Mireille Fares, Sr. AI Solution Architect, NVIDIA

AI-Generated Summary of this Video

Rate Now

This lab explores key principles for advancing multi-modal systems, focusing on multi-modal information typology, alignment, multi-step reasoning, and cross-modal flow. We analyze redundant, unique, and synergistic information, and examine multi-modal alignment through coarse-grained versus fine-grained behavior. The lab then investigates multi-step multi-modality reasoning with external knowledge, where agents integrate images, text, tables, and diagrams to solve complex tasks. Finally, we study multi-modal information flow through cross-modal translation, cross-modal editing, and cross-modal querying, supported by NIM examples for text-to-image generation, semantic image editing, and visual question-answering.

Prerequisite(s):

Basic understanding of machine learning and deep learning concepts, including embeddings and neural network architectures.

Familiarity with multimodal AI concepts, such as combining text, image, and other data modalities.

Experience with Python programming and standard ML libraries (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow).

Basic knowledge of data visualization techniques (e.g., PCA, t-SNE) for interpreting embeddings.

Explore training opportunities from the [NVIDIA Deep Learning Institute](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/training/instructor-led-workshops/?nvid=nv-int-vdeo-581056) (DLI). ## Explore the Data Science Grandmaster Series

In each episode, some of the world's leading experts in data science share their insights, best practices, and key learnings from a recent competition. Tune in and learn how to apply their learnings to your own data science challenges.
